_readme: Photos for the gallery and scattered around the site. To add a photo: drop the file in public/brand/photos/, then add an entry here with src (path under /brand/photos/), alt (describe it for screen readers), w and h (the image's pixel width and height — right-click the file > Properties > Details on Windows, or just estimate the ratio). Captions are optional and should stay factual — jersey numbers and opponents only, no made-up player names.
